back_translation: For the choirmaster. A Psalm of David.
Rescue me, O LORD, from evil men; protect me from men of violence,
who devise evil in their hearts and stir up war all day long.
They sharpen their tongues like a serpent; the venom of vipers is under their lips. Selah
Guard me, O LORD, from the hands of the wicked; protect me from men of violence who plan to trip my feet.
The proud have hidden a snare for me; they have spread the cords of their net along the path and set traps for me. Selah
I say to the LORD, 'You are my God.' Hear, O LORD, the voice of my pleas for mercy.
O LORD, my Lord, the strength of my salvation, You cover my head in the day of battle.
Do not grant, O LORD, the desires of the wicked; do not let their evil plan succeed, lest they be exalted. Selah
As for the head of those who surround me, may the trouble their lips have caused cover them.
May burning coals fall upon them; may they be cast into the fire, into miry pits, never to rise again.
May no slanderer be established in the land; may evil hunt down the man of violence speedily.
I know that the LORD will maintain the cause of the afflicted and justice for the needy.
Surely the righteous will give thanks to Your name; the upright will dwell in Your presence.
